data.content:
Implementation handoff capsule

Branch: worktree-foolery-7192-setlist-counts (origin)
Commit: 0ab5829d

Fixes the unselected setlist row knot count by enriching the shared beat map with all plan beats (including shipped beats not present in the repo's default beats listing). Adds a 'Done' badge and 'Complete plan' button that surface when workableBeatCount === 0, wiring through a new POST /api/plans/[planId]/complete route backed by KnotsBackend.close + markTerminal (the canonical force: true correction path).

Pre-extracted setlist-view.tsx into:
- src/components/plan-summary-card.tsx
- src/components/setlist-empty-state.tsx
- src/components/setlist-view-data.ts

New helpers in src/lib/setlist-chart.ts: countWorkableBeatIds, isTerminalPlanArtifactState. New module src/lib/orchestration-plan-correction.ts: completePlan (delegates to getBackend().close).

Verified via Playwright at http://localhost:3287/beats?repo=/Users/cartine/foolery&view=setlist: both real plans (foolery-9bf4 ready_for_design, foolery-79a3 ready_for_review) correctly show '0 remaining' + Done badge + Complete button on both selected and unselected cards. Toggling selection keeps the count stable at 0. Did NOT click Complete in production per the project's no-terminal-without-explicit-instruction rule; click path is covered by unit tests.

Quality gates: bun run lint clean, bunx tsc --noEmit clean, bun run test 2785/2785 passing, bun run build clean.

TERMINAL_PLAN_ARTIFACT_STATES = ['shipped', 'abandoned'] confirmed against ~/knots/loom/execution_plan_sdlc/workflow.loom (blocked + deferred are escapes, not terminals).
